name: Geckoboard Datasets API
description: Geckoboard's Datasets API is a powerful and flexible way to compile data from in-house systems, third-party tools, and databases on your Geckoboard dashboard. You can create datasets, push data to them, and they will automatically update all widgets powered by that dataset.

apis.name: Geckoboard Datasets API
